messages.content: Does my plan have a data cap?

[{"chunk_id":"plan-current-page","doc_id":"plan-current-page","score":"F:0.0","text":"Our current plan is contract-free, with no minimum term, you can cancel any time, and there is no early-termination fee. Data is unlimited."}]
messages.name: search_knowledge

response.content: No, your plan has unlimited data with no cap.
